title: Trimble Jobsite Connectivity Bundle Links 3D Models and Data Across Trimble Civil Construction Hardware and Software Solutions
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif., Feb. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today the Trimble® Jobsite Connectivity Bundle, a software bundle that links 3D models and data across Trimble civil construction hardware and software solutions.

title: Trimble Announces FedRAMP In Process Status for e-Builder Enterprise Government Edition
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Feb. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that e-Builder Enterprise Government Edition, a leading cloud-based construction program management solution for owners of capital improvement programs, has achieved FedRAMP In Process status.

title: Down 25% in 2020, This Growth Stock Looks Like a Great Value
text: Trimble stock has corrected in 2022, and it's now looking like an excellent value for its growth prospects.

title: New Study from Dodge Construction Network Reveals Digital Transformation Led By Construction Owners
text: HAMILTON, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dodge Construction Network, and Trimble, today released a Dodge SmartMarket Brief on a study of owners, architects, engineers and contractors.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Outpace Estimates
text: Trimble (TRMB) reports strong fourth-quarter results driven by solid momentum across buildings & infrastructure, geospatial, and resources & utilities segments.

title: Trimble's transportation revenue down 3% year-over-year in Q4
text: Trimble Inc.'s transportation revenue decreased 3% year-over-year to $155 million during the fourth quarter.  The company's transportation segment was adversely impacted by supply chain challenges both at Trimble and its OEM customers, David Barnes, chief financial officer, said during an earnings call Wednesday.

title: Trimble Dimensions+ 2022 Call for Speakers Now Open
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif., Feb. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) has opened its Call for Speakers for the Trimble Dimensions+ 2022 User Conference, which will be held November 7-9 at the Venetian Resort in Las Vegas, Nevada.

title: Trimble Introduces Next Generation 3D Paving Control System for Asphalt Compactors
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif., Feb. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) introduced today Trimble® Roadworks Paving Control Platform for Asphalt Compactors that enables operators to accurately control the compaction process, while reducing unnecessary passes that can result in over compaction.
